name: pantheon
description: Pantheon: a local, OAuth-only delegation mesh that lets Claude Code, Grok Build, and Codex hand work to each other on one machine. No API keys, no daemons. Claude routes visual work to Grok Imagine; any agent can ask another for a second opinion or implementation, behind a loop guard and a read-only-by-default write gate.

scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs || echo 'tests not yet wired'
